## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Package README updated if module behavior changed
- [ ] ADR added under `docs/architecture/adr/` if this is an architecturally significant change
- [ ] No secrets, real ingested artifacts, or customer data included in this PR
